subject: Write README with setup instructions
description:
Spec requires: "README with setup instructions. Code must build and run from a fresh clone."

Cover: project overview (1 para), prerequisites (node), setup (`cd app && npm ci`), dev (`npm run dev`), build (`npm run build`), deploy (`npm run deploy`), live URL, tech stack list. Keep it short - this is a week-long interview project, not an OSS library.
